items.title: Understanding The UK Meningitis B Outbreak — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Husna Musa & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: We must push for the licensing of the MenB vaccine to ensure Malaysia is protected against this devastating but preventable disease. The post Understanding The UK Meningitis B Outbreak — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Husna Musa & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Has Up To Five Months’ Medicine Stock, Says MOH
items.summary: MOH says it has 1-3 months of medicine stock supplies, supported by additional buffer stock of up to 2 months by its concessionaire. Local pharmaceutical manufacturers have up to 3 months' raw material stock and about 2 months' stock of finished products. The post Malaysia Has Up To Five Months’ Medicine Stock, Says MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Fruit And Vegetable Prices In Malaysia Set To Rise: Farmers
items.summary: Farmers' groups warn of increases in the prices of fruits and vegetables in Malaysia due to fertiliser shortages and diesel costs, amid the Iran war. Vegetable prices are expected to soar by 50% in one or two weeks and fruits by 20% in three to six months. The post Fruit And Vegetable Prices In Malaysia Set To Rise: Farmers appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Vulnerable To Fertiliser Import Disruptions, Says RSIS
items.summary: RSIS says Malaysia is vulnerable to fertiliser import disruption from the Iran war as Malaysia’s domestic fertiliser production can only meet 39% of annual fertiliser use. Second wave impact is LNG trade disruption; LNG is a critical input to produce urea. The post Malaysia Vulnerable To Fertiliser Import Disruptions, Says RSIS appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: China Curbs Fertiliser Exports, Chinese Supplies Comprise Third Of Malaysia’s Imported Fertilisers
items.summary: China has severely curbed fertiliser exports. China, which is the 2nd highest origin of Malaysia's fertiliser imports, reportedly supplied a third of Malaysia's fertiliser imports in 2025. Malaysia's local fertiliser market is also warning of disruptions. The post China Curbs Fertiliser Exports, Chinese Supplies Comprise Third Of Malaysia’s Imported Fertilisers appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Review SSPA Structure, Trained Paramedics Still At U1 Grade — Coalition Of Three Paramedic Schemes
items.summary: An upgrade of the clerical service scheme from Grade 1 to Grade 5 has raised concerns among paramedics in MOH, as this wasn't extended to certain health care support schemes, namely Public Health Assistants, Community Nurses, and Dental Surgery Assistants. The post Review SSPA Structure, Trained Paramedics Still At U1 Grade — Coalition Of Three Paramedic Schemes appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Anti-Tobacco Groups Slam FT Mufti Office’s Meeting With Tobacco Company
items.summary: Anti-tobacco groups brand Philip Morris' visit to the FT Mufti's Office as breaching Article 5.3 of WHO FCTC that requires protection of public health policies from tobacco industry interference. Public officials should avoid such unnecessary engagement. The post Anti-Tobacco Groups Slam FT Mufti Office’s Meeting With Tobacco Company appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Balik Kampung: From Family Duty To National Elder Care Policy
items.summary: When families gather after the Eid prayer, when grandchildren run through the house, and when adult children sit beside their ageing parents, something deeply meaningful is restored. These moments reaffirm bonds that modern life often strains. The post Balik Kampung: From Family Duty To National Elder Care Policy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysian Fertiliser Producers Pause New Orders Amid Soaring Prices
items.summary: Malaysian fertiliser makers Union Harvest and FGV Fertiliser have suspended new orders due to increased prices of raw materials by some 100% to 150% in just a fortnight. Experts previously warned of food price hikes in Malaysia due to fertiliser costs. The post Malaysian Fertiliser Producers Pause New Orders Amid Soaring Prices appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Tobacco/Vape Industry’s Pivot To Religious Authorities A Public Health Concern — Fahmi Hassan
items.summary: The tobacco industry's meeting with a religious office is very alarming. Having faced firm resistance from health authorities, the industry is searching for new avenues of validation. Heated tobacco products and vapes remain harmful. The post Tobacco/Vape Industry’s Pivot To Religious Authorities A Public Health Concern — Fahmi Hassan appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Appeals court acquits labourer of drug trafficking charge
items.summary: PUTRAJAYA: The Court of Appeal has acquitted a labourer of a charge of trafficking 366.93g of methamphetamine. Read full story
